# isValid

**Instance Property**

A Boolean that indicates whether the operating system has granted the capability to the browser extension process.

## Declaration

```swift
var isValid: Bool { get }
```

## Overview

If the operating system has granted this capability to the browser extension process and you haven’t called [doc://com.apple.BrowserEngineKit/documentation/BrowserEngineKit/ProcessCapability/Grant/invalidate()], then this property’s value is `true`; otherwise, it’s false.

## Testing and changing validity

- **invalidate()**: Invalidates the grant, removing the capability from the process it was granted to.
